subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Thanks be unto the Lord that thou art beholding the Kingdom of Abhá, and art drawing light from the rays of guidance. From all else save the Truth thou art detached, and filled with yearning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی شکر لله که ناظر بملکوت ابهائی و مقتبس انوار هدی از غیر حق بیزاری و مشتاق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @knowledge; recognition of God, @firmness in the Covenant
